panels.title: Distinct Modules Reporting (last 5 min)
panels.description: Real query against sync_events_history -- previously this panel was labeled "Active Drone Cluster Count" but ran `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_stat_activity`, which is Postgres's own internal connection count and has nothing to do with drones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT module) FROM sync_events_history WHERE created_at > now() - interval '5 minutes'

panels.title: Sync Event Ingestion Rate (per minute)
panels.description: Real event throughput from sync_events_history, bucketed per minute. Previously labeled "Kafka Message Ingestion Rate (Simulated)" and literally returned `random() * 1000 + 500` -- fake data with no connection to real Kafka/DB activity. This is real Sync Layer traffic (DRONE_TELEMETRY_UPDATE, module publishes, etc.) -- true Kafka broker throughput (rust-gateway -> telemetry.physical, sync.py -> telemetry.aerospace) isn't visible from Postgres at all and needs a Kafka JMX/Prometheus exporter (see report: this is real future work, not faked here).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS metric FROM sync_events_history WHERE created_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT module, COUNT(*) AS metric FROM sync_events_history WHERE created_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY module ORDER BY metric DESC
SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS metric FROM sync_events_history WHERE event = 'DRONE_TELEMETRY_UPDATE' AND created_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
